_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 heterozygosity fosters de novo tumorigenesis but impairs malignant transformation.

_contextSnippet: expected genotypes were confirmed by PCR...we also evaluated the extent of Cre recombinase action to delete NF1 in the epidermis by four means
details: Successfully achieved Nf1 knockout specifically in keratinocytes as confirmed by PCR, western blot, immunohistochemistry, and X-Gal staining
